text: The atmosphere here is strangely sterile yet futuristic, bathed in blue and purple light. The emptiness and stillness of the room evoke a sense of anticipation, as if something important has just ended or is about to begin. Shadows and reflections dominate the scene, and I feel small, reminded of how spaces shape our moods—half comforted by the orderliness, half unsettled by the absence of life or sound. Everything looks ready for innovation, yet waits in suspenseful pause.
